recommendations.title: Unknown Number: The High School Catfish
recommendations.overview: Vulgar, taunting texts blow up the phones of a teen and her boyfriend. Who's sending them — and why? This twisty documentary reveals the shocking answer.

recommendations.title: American Pie: Revealed
recommendations.overview: Documentary about the making of American Pie (1999), American Pie 2 (2001) and American Wedding (2003).

recommendations.title: The Look of Silence
recommendations.overview: An optician grapples with the Indonesian mass killings of 1965-1966, during which his older brother was exterminated.

recommendations.title: It Happened One Night
recommendations.overview: A runaway heiress makes a deal with the rogue reporter trailing her but the mismatched pair end up stuck with each other when their bus leaves them behind.

recommendations.title: Naqoyqatsi
recommendations.overview: A visual montage portrait of our contemporary world dominated by globalized technology and violence.

recommendations.title: Fahrenheit 11/9
recommendations.overview: Michael Moore's provocative documentary explores the two most important questions of the Trump Era: How did we get here, and how do we get out.

recommendations.title: Pocketful of Miracles
recommendations.overview: A New York gangster and his girlfriend attempt to turn street beggar Apple Annie into a society lady when the peddler learns her daughter is marrying royalty.

recommendations.title: Hammamet
recommendations.overview: The last years of Bettino Craxi, one of the most important and controversial italian leader of the 1980's.

recommendations.title: The Jacket
recommendations.genres: Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A military veteran goes on a journey into the future, where he can foresee his death and is left with questions that could save his life and those he loves.

recommendations.title: Mr. Smith Goes to Washington
recommendations.overview: After the death of a United States Senator, idealistic Jefferson Smith is appointed as his replacement in Washington. Soon, the naive and earnest new senator has to battle political corruption.
